meta.title: Featured practitioners
meta.description: Choose existing practitioners for marketing placements and manage their visibility windows.

title: Featured practitioners
subtitle: Choose existing practitioners for marketing placements and manage their visibility windows.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, email, or title

editor.description: Select a practitioner, then adjust the placement settings and time window.

picker.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug, email, or title
picker.searchHint: Pick one existing practitioner. Identity is filled in automatically.
picker.eligibleNotice: This practitioner looks eligible for featuring.
picker.ineligibleWarning: This practitioner may not be eligible. The backend will block invalid saves.

end.title: End visibility
end.description: This will pause the featured placement. You can resume it later if needed.

resume.title: Resume visibility
resume.description: Bring this placement back online if it is still valid.

fields.endsAtHint: Leave empty for an open-ended placement.
fields.priorityHint: Choose a slot from 1 to 5. Slot 1 appears first on the homepage.

states.emptyDescription: Select a practitioner from the system and set the visibility window.
states.listErrorDescription: We could not load featured practitioner placements.
states.readOnlyDescription: You do not have permission to edit this page.

validation.endsAtAfterStartsAt: End date must be after start date.

errors.notFound: The requested placement was not found.
errors.priorityOutOfRange: Display slot must be between 1 and 5.
errors.slotAlreadyTaken: This slot is already taken during the same period. Choose a different slot or change the visibility period.
errors.resumeExpired: The display period has ended. Update the end date or create a new placement.
errors.invalidPractitioner: The selected practitioner is not eligible.
errors.overlap: Another active placement already exists for this practitioner and time window.
errors.homeSlotsFull: You've reached the maximum number of active display slots on the homepage.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
